report.summary: Day 70 standup #16: Since v14, build shipped Perpetual DEX Comparison + Cross-Chain Bridge Security guides (6,500 words, FAQPage JSON-LD fix for ALL 179+ learn pages), design audited 4 pages (11 issues, 9 fixed, 4 OG images, TradingViewChart error handling), community-v13 covered BTC $71K surge (Trump Iran postponement), Bitmine $138M ETH, Resolv $80M breach (5 tweets + 2 SVG cards), publish promoted 2 pages and triggered Vercel redeploy vwbUJnu7E. EOD-v14 confirms 686 uncommitted, git locks 7 days. PUBLISH_QUEUE now empty. 77 runs today ($6,572). Git locks remain sole blocker.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v14: Full 6-agent rotation completed — build (Perp DEX + Bridge Security), design (4-page UX audit), community-v13 (BTC $71K coverage), eod-v14 (zero code delta), publish (2 pages promoted + Vercel redeploy), plus this standup.

BUILD OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Best Perpetual DEX Comparison 2026 (~3,500 words, Hyperliquid vs dYdX vs GMX vs Jupiter vs Drift, 5 platforms, comparison table) and Cross-Chain Bridge Security Guide 2026 (~3,000 words, $2.3B exploit history, 4 architecture types, ZK bridges trend). MAJOR: FAQPage JSON-LD schema added to LearnPageLayout — all 179+ learn pages now auto-generate FAQ structured data for rich snippets.

DESIGN OUTPUT: UX audit of 4 pages — DeFi Points, Blob Space, Initia ecosystem, Maple Finance. 11 issues found, 9 fixed (mobile grid overflow, touch targets, aria accessibility, TradingViewChart error fallback). 4 new OG images created. 2 issues deferred (FAQ accordion pattern, data freshness timestamps).

COMMUNITY-V13 OUTPUT: BTC surged 5% to $71K after Trump postponed Iran strikes. 5 new tweets (BTC $71K rally, Bitmine $138M ETH 4-part thread, Resolv Labs $80M breach warning, F&G at 8 historical, Fed dissent signal). 2 SVG social cards. Newsletter v6 addendum #3. Content calendar v10 with 6 new posts through Mar 29.
PUBLISH OUTPUT: Promoted 2 pages (DeFi Points + Blob Space) from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES (batch 12). Triggered Vercel redeploy vwbUJnu7E. PUBLISH_QUEUE now empty — new pages needed.

EOD-V14 FINDING: 686 uncommitted changes (48 modified + 638 untracked). Git locks persist 7 days. 25 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts (masked). 2 use-client bugs remain (unichain, appchains). 0/6 core routes with rate limiter.

MARKET CONTEXT: BTC $71,000 (+5% intraday on Trump Iran postponement). F&G 8 (Extreme Fear, Day 47+). Bitmine bought 65,341 ETH ($138M, 3rd consecutive week). Morgan Stanley BTC ETF application updated. Resolv Labs breached ($80M unbacked USR). Fed held rates, Miran dissented for 25bps cut.
SEO WIN: FAQPage JSON-LD now on ALL learn pages. This is the single biggest structured data improvement to date — should generate FAQ rich snippets across 179+ pages once deployed.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v14: Build (2 guides + FAQ schema fix), design (4-page audit + 4 OG images + TradingViewChart fix), community-v13 (5 tweets + 2 cards + newsletter + calendar), eod-v14 (QA confirmation), publish (2 pages promoted + Vercel redeploy). 5 agents + this standup = 6 runs, $497 human-equivalent.

TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 28+ learn guides built, 22+ OG images, 51+ social posts + 20 SVG cards, 14 QA cycles, 13 design audits, 77 agent runs across ~13 rotations. Publish triggered Vercel redeploy this cycle.
BLOCKER [P0 — 7 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. All git commit/push blocked. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — requires Jefe's manual intervention.

NOTE: Publish agent triggered Vercel redeploy (vwbUJnu7E) this cycle. If this succeeds, the 2 promoted pages (DeFi Points + Blob Space) plus all previously committed content would be live. However, uncommitted changes (686 files) still cannot reach production without clearing git locks.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: Now empty after batch 12 promotion. Build cycle needs to scaffold new pages to refill queue.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields missing in-memory cache and fallback data. 4/6 routes lack upstream failure fallback.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 25 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts + 2 use-client+metadata bugs (unichain, appchains).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs without page.tsx. 2 deferred design issues (FAQ accordion, data freshness timestamps).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY (P0, Day 7): 686 uncommitted files. Single command fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → staged commit → push → Vercel auto-deploy. FAQPage JSON-LD fix alone (179+ pages gaining FAQ rich snippets) justifies an immediate deploy. Every hour without this wastes the structured data improvement.

PRIORITY 2 — SCAFFOLD NEW PAGES (PUBLISH_QUEUE EMPTY): Queue is now depleted after batch 12. Next build cycle should prioritize scaffolding 4-6 new pages to refill. Suggested: high-search-volume topics like 'best crypto exchanges 2026', 'bitcoin halving countdown', 'solana vs ethereum comparison 2026' based on current market narratives.

PRIORITY 3 — WIRE RATE LIMITER TO CORE API ROUTES: 40+ cycle carry-over. With potential deploy incoming, unprotected API routes become a real production risk. Even a basic implementation on /api/prices and /api/trending would be high-value.

STRATEGIC NOTE: BTC $71K relief rally + Extreme Fear Day 47 + Bitmine institutional accumulation + MS ETF filing = perfect storm for 'smart money is buying' narrative. Community-v13 has 5 ready tweets + 2 SVG cards covering this exact angle. Resolv Labs breach ties directly to our Smart Contract Security Guide. Deploy unblocking would make all of this live content.
